vulnerability.reason: generated emphasizes undetectable misspecification due to lack of ground truth, while reference highlights silent accuracy degradation from misspecification and distribution shifts

impact.reference: Users receive erroneous predictions leading to unsafe navigation or incorrect medical advice.
impact.generated: Deployed compressed models suffer systematic accuracy collapse from amplified distribution shifts, compromising application reliability and user safety.

dose_response.reason: generated arc introduces data-free distillation, undetectable misspecification, and edge device deployment, which diverges from the reference causal chain
dose_response.reference: Misspecified causal graphs in compressed models silently degrade accuracy under distribution shifts, leading to confident but erroneous predictions that cause unsafe navigation or incorrect medical advice.
dose_response.generated: Misspecified causal models introducing confounding and distribution shifts, through ML engineers deploying compressed models on edge devices, trigger undetectable graph misspecification in data-free distillation, leading to systematic accuracy collapse, compromising reliability and user safety.
